headlines.title: Iran Reportedly Responds to US Peace Proposal
headlines.description: The Iranian government has reportedly sent a response to a United States peace proposal. Iranian media reports that Iran has now passed its response to Pakistani mediators, saying it focuses on ending the war and safety of maritime traffic in the Gulf and Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for Sunday TODAY.

headlines.title: Energy Sec. Wright says 'we're open to all ideas' amid calls to suspend gas tax: Full interview
headlines.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright tells Meet the Press that the Trump administration’s priority is ending Iran’s nuclear program and restoring secure shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, while ongoing tensions could keep gas prices elevated in the short term.

headlines.title: Graphic: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Iran has responded to U.S. proposal in peace talks, state media reports
headlines.description: Iran has responded to a U.S. proposal to bring an end to the war in the Middle East, Iranian state media reported Sunday

headlines.title: Hantavirus-Plagued Cruise Arrives in Canary Islands
headlines.description: The ship at the heart of the deadly hantavirus outbreak has arrived in the Canary Islands. Crews in hazmat suits have begun the complicated task of screening and getting more than 100 passengers off the ship without potentially exposing themselves or the public to the virus. NBC’s Daniele Hamamdjian reports for Sunday TODAY.

headlines.title: Govs. Wes Moore, Sarah Huckabee Sanders tackle the maternal health crisis: Full panel
headlines.description: Gov. Wes Moore (D-Md.), Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders (R-Ark.) and philanthropist Olivia Walton join Meet the Press for a Common Ground conversation around maternal health.

headlines.title: ‘Get in loser, we’re buying Spirit’: One man’s viral plan to revive the airline
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines was the budget-friendly carrier America loved to hate.

headlines.title: Senator Booker reacts to new SC ruling
headlines.description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) shared his opinion on the U.S. Supreme Court imposing new limits on the Voting Rights Act.
